_meta.description: Conversion table for Way of the Stonefist. Keys are lowercase keyword patterns matched against modifier stat text.
sources: Example 1: Fine Bracers (DEX rare) -> Fists of Stone
Example 2: Knightly Mitts (STR rare) -> Fists of Stone
Example 3: Treefingers (STR unique) -> Fists of Stone
Example 4: Hand of Wisdom and Action (DEX/INT unique) -> Fists of Stone
key_patterns: UNIQUE vs RARE: Unique mods follow item-specific conversion rules, not generic ones
Flat vs % defence stats convert DIFFERENTLY (flat Armour splits into 2 per-level mods; % increased Armour → single % more mod)
Resource thresholds: Life → on Low Life bonus; Mana → on Low Mana bonus
Attack stats → Cast stats (Attack Speed → Cast Speed, same % value)
CC buildup → different CC buildup (Stun → Immobilisation, ratio ~0.72)
Keystones → different keystones (Giant's Blood → Hollow Palm Technique)
Critical Hit triggers → preserve % chance, change effect type
Flat Armour → per-level EVA + per-level ES (split, both stacking with Fists of Stone base implicit)
Strength (flat) → increased Area of Effect for Attacks (ratio ~1.25x)
per 20 [Attribute] mods: the attribute SWAPS (DEX ↔ INT on HoWA unique)

increased evasion rating.converted_stat: more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield
increased evasion rating.example: 75% increased Evasion Rating → 15% more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield

increased armour.converted_stat: more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield
increased armour.example: 51% increased Armour → 13% more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield
increased armour.note: % increased Armour converts as a SINGLE stat (unlike flat +Armour which splits into 2 per-level mods). Ratio ~4 vs ~5 for Evasion.

to armour.converted_stat: Has +X to Evasion Rating per player level + Has +Y to maximum Energy Shield per player level
to armour.formula: unknown — +84 flat Armour → +2 EVA/level + +1 ES/level; +(123-160) Armour → +4 EVA/level + +1 ES/level (Horror Palm showcase)
to armour.example: +84 to Armour → Has +2 to Evasion Rating per player level + Has +1 to maximum Energy Shield per player level
split_outputs: Has +4 to Evasion Rating per player level (showcase)
Has +1 to maximum Energy Shield per player level (showcase)
to armour.note: FLAT Armour only. Converts to BOTH EVA and ES per level (Fists of Stone is hybrid). Stacks with base implicits. Showcase values from Horror Palm +(123-160) Armour prefix.

to evasion rating.converted_stat: Has +X to Evasion Rating per player level
to evasion rating.formula: unknown — by analogy with flat Armour (splits into per-level). Flat EVA may split or just → EVA/level.
to evasion rating.example: No confirmed example yet. By analogy: flat Armour → per-level EVA + per-level ES (split). Flat EVA may follow similar pattern.
to evasion rating.note: BY ANALOGY with flat Armour which splits into EVA/level + ES/level. Flat EVA may convert to EVA/level only, or still split — unconfirmed.

adds physical damage to attacks.converted_stat: Attacks Gain ?% of Damage as Extra Physical Damage
adds physical damage to attacks.formula: unknown — tier-dependent. T-low (5-9) → 13%; T-high (13-23) → 24% (Damnation Palm unique)
adds physical damage to attacks.example: Adds 13 to 23 Physical Damage to Attacks → Attacks Gain 24% of Damage as Extra Physical Damage (Damnation Palm unique, confirmed)

maximum life.converted_stat: less damage taken while on Low Life
maximum life.formula: unknown — +84 Life → 10% less dmg on Low Life
maximum life.example: +84 to maximum Life → 10% less damage taken while on Low Life

to intelligence.converted_stat: increased Cooldown Recovery Rate (rare) OR increased Intelligence (unique)
to intelligence.formula: rare: ~value:value numeric; unique: ~value * 0.35 (HoWA: +20 INT → 7% increased INT)
to intelligence.example: RARE: +22 to Intelligence → 21% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate (Fine Bracers). UNIQUE: +20 to Intelligence → 7% increased Intelligence (Hand of Wisdom and Action)
to intelligence.note: CONTEXT-DEPENDENT. Rare items: INT → CDR. Unique items: INT → % increased INT. The conversion rule differs by item type.

maximum mana.converted_stat: more Attack damage while on Low Mana
maximum mana.formula: unknown — +61 Mana → 18% more Attack damage on Low Mana
maximum mana.example: +61 to maximum Mana → 18% more Attack damage while on Low Mana

to strength.converted_stat: increased Area of Effect for Attacks
to strength.example: +16 to Strength → 20% increased Area of Effect for Attacks; +31 to Strength → 30% increased AoE (Knightly Mitts)

predict_formula.output_pattern: ~{value}% increased Area of Effect for Attacks

to cold resistance.converted_stat: keeps X% Cold Resistance + adds +2% to Maximum Cold Resistance
to cold resistance.formula: RARE: full value kept (unconfirmed). UNIQUE: value÷2 (suspected by analogy with Fire/Lightning).
to cold resistance.example: RARE (Fine Bracers?): +32% Cold Res → +32% kept + +2% Max. UNIQUE: pattern likely halved like Fire/Lightning.
split_outputs: +X% to Cold Resistance (full value on rare; halved on unique — unconfirmed)
to cold resistance.note: Pattern: RARE items keep full resistance. UNIQUE items (Damnation Palm confirmed for Fire/Lightning) have value÷2. Cold unique not confirmed yet.

to fire resistance.converted_stat: keeps X% Fire Resistance + adds +2% to Maximum Fire Resistance
to fire resistance.formula: RARE: full value kept (likely). UNIQUE: value÷2, rounded up (27→14, confirmed Damnation Palm)
to fire resistance.example: UNIQUE (Damnation Palm confirmed): +27% Fire Resistance → +14% Fire Res + +2% Maximum Fire Res
split_outputs: +X% to Fire Resistance (full on rare; halved on unique)
to fire resistance.note: CONFIRMED on Damnation Palm unique: value÷2 rounded up. Rare items likely keep full value (same pattern as seen with Cold on rare gloves).

to lightning resistance.converted_stat: keeps X% Lightning Resistance + adds +2% to Maximum Lightning Resistance
to lightning resistance.formula: RARE: full value kept (likely). UNIQUE: value÷2 exact (40→20, confirmed Damnation Palm)
to lightning resistance.example: UNIQUE (Damnation Palm confirmed): +40% Lightning Resistance → +20% Lightning Res + +2% Maximum Lightning Res
split_outputs: +X% to Lightning Resistance (full on rare; halved on unique)
to lightning resistance.note: CONFIRMED on Damnation Palm unique: value÷2. Rare items likely keep full value.

to level of all melee skills.converted_stat: +X/2 to Level of all Melee Skills + increased Quality of all Skills
to level of all melee skills.example: +2 to Level of all Melee Skills → +1 to Level of all Melee Skills + +10% to Quality of all Skills (Knightly Mitts)
split_outputs: +X to Level of all Melee Skills (value halved)

attack speed.example: 5% reduced Attack Speed → 5% reduced Cast Speed
attack speed.note: Attack Speed converts to Cast Speed preserving the exact % value. Pattern: attack stat → cast stat.

stun buildup.example: 29% increased Stun Buildup → 21% increased Immobilisation buildup
stun buildup.note: CC buildup stat → different CC buildup stat. Stun is a form of Immobilisation.

gain arcane surge.converted_stat: chance to gain a Power Charge on Critical Hit
gain arcane surge.example: 10% chance to Gain Arcane Surge when you deal a Critical Hit → 10% chance to gain a Power Charge on Critical Hit
gain arcane surge.note: Critical Hit triggers preserve % chance, change effect type.

giant's blood.note: Keystones convert to thematically related keystones. STR-themed keystone → Martial Artist/unarmed keystone.

to chaos resistance.converted_stat: keeps X% Chaos Resistance + adds +2% to Maximum Chaos Resistance
to chaos resistance.formula: RARE likely: full value kept. UNIQUE likely: value÷2. By analogy with Fire/Lightning/Cold.
to chaos resistance.example: No confirmed example yet. By analogy: Fire +27→+14 (unique, ÷2) + +2% Max.
split_outputs: +X% to Chaos Resistance (full on rare; likely halved on unique — unconfirmed)
to chaos resistance.note: BY ANALOGY with fire/cold/lightning resistance. Chaos resist is special in PoE2 — pattern may differ.

to dexterity.example: +20 to Dexterity → 11% increased Dexterity (Hand of Wisdom and Action unique)
to dexterity.note: UNIQUE ITEM specific. On rare DEX gloves the conversion may differ. Formula: +20 flat → 11% increased.

increased energy shield.converted_stat: more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield
increased energy shield.formula: unknown — by analogy: Evasion ÷5, Armour ÷4. Energy Shield likely ÷5 (INT/DEX type).
increased energy shield.example: No confirmed example yet. By analogy: % increased Evasion Rating → ÷5 more Global EVA+ES.
increased energy shield.note: BY ANALOGY with increased Evasion (÷5) and Armour (÷4): % increased ES → more Global EVA+ES at similar ratio. Ratio unconfirmed.

adds fire damage to attacks.converted_stat: Attacks Gain ?% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
adds fire damage to attacks.formula: unknown — by analogy: Cold (11-18)→17%, Lightning (2-41)→20%, Physical (13-23)→24%
adds fire damage to attacks.example: No confirmed example yet. By analogy with Cold and Lightning damage: elemental type PRESERVED.
adds fire damage to attacks.note: BY ANALOGY with cold and lightning: elemental type preserved, flat damage → extra % of same element. Formula unknown (% varies by tier).

adds cold damage to attacks.converted_stat: Attacks Gain ?% of Damage as Extra Cold Damage
adds cold damage to attacks.example: Adds 11 to 18 Cold Damage to Attacks → Attacks Gain 17% of Damage as Extra Cold Damage (Damnation Palm unique, confirmed)
adds cold damage to attacks.note: Elemental type PRESERVED: Cold → Extra Cold. Formula unknown (% varies by tier).

adds lightning damage to attacks.converted_stat: Attacks Gain ?% of Damage as Extra Lightning Damage
adds lightning damage to attacks.example: Adds 2 to 41 Lightning Damage to Attacks → Attacks Gain 20% of Damage as Extra Lightning Damage (Damnation Palm unique, confirmed)
adds lightning damage to attacks.note: Elemental type PRESERVED: Lightning → Extra Lightning. (HoWA special case: Lightning → Cold due to unique theme.) Formula unknown (% varies by tier).

life per enemy hit with attacks.converted_stat: Gain X Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks if you have dealt a Critical Hit Recently
life per enemy hit with attacks.example: Gain 5 Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks → Gain 13 Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks if you have dealt a Critical Hit Recently (Damnation Palm unique, CONFIRMED)
life per enemy hit with attacks.note: Life on Hit → more Life on Hit but requires Critical Hit Recently condition. Multiplier ~2.6x confirmed on Damnation Palm unique.

increased attack speed.converted_stat: chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Hit
increased attack speed.formula: % value preserved (14% attack speed → 14% Onslaught chance)
increased attack speed.example: Horror Palm rare (DEX/INT): 14% increased Attack Speed → 14% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Hit
increased attack speed.note: RARE DEX-type: increased Attack Speed → Onslaught on Hit (confirmed on rare Horror Palm and likely Thunderfist). STR-type: 'reduced Attack Speed' → 'reduced Cast Speed' (Treefingers unique) — may be different rule.

increased cast speed.example: 13% increased Cast Speed → 13% increased Attack Speed (Demon Stitcher unique)
increased cast speed.note: Cast Speed ↔ Attack Speed swap is BIDIRECTIONAL. Attack Speed → Cast Speed on Treefingers (confirmed); Cast Speed → Attack Speed confirmed on Demon Stitcher. Value preserved in both directions.

increased evasion and energy shield.converted_stat: more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield
increased evasion and energy shield.example: 75% increased Evasion and Energy Shield → 15% more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield (Thunderfist unique, DEX/INT hybrid stat)
increased evasion and energy shield.note: DEX/INT hybrid combined defence stat. Same ÷5 ratio as single 'increased Evasion Rating'. Confirmed on Thunderfist unique (if 75% rolled → 15% more).

increased armour, evasion and energy shi.converted_stat: more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield
increased armour, evasion and energy shi.example: ~150% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield → 19% more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield (Sine Aequo unique, 150/8≈18.75≈19)
increased armour, evasion and energy shi.note: Tri-hybrid defence stat (STR/DEX/INT). Different ratio from single stats (÷5 for Evasion, ÷4 for Armour). Confirmed on Sine Aequo at max roll 150% → 19%. Ratio ÷8.

attack speed per 20 dexterity.converted_stat: increased Area of Effect per 20 Intelligence
attack speed per 20 dexterity.formula: % value preserved; Attack Speed → Area of Effect; DEX scaling → INT scaling
attack speed per 20 dexterity.example: 1% increased Attack Speed per 20 Dexterity → 1% increased Area of Effect per 20 Intelligence
attack speed per 20 dexterity.note: UNIQUE ITEM: Hand of Wisdom and Action. Attribute swaps DEX ↔ INT. Main stat changes Attack Speed → AoE.

lightning damage to attacks per 20 intel.converted_stat: Adds Cold Damage to Attacks per 20 Dexterity
lightning damage to attacks per 20 intel.formula: Lightning → Cold; INT scaling → DEX scaling; damage values change
lightning damage to attacks per 20 intel.example: Adds 1 to 10 Lightning Damage to Attacks per 20 Intelligence → Adds 6 to 8 Cold Damage to Attacks per 20 Dexterity
lightning damage to attacks per 20 intel.note: UNIQUE ITEM: Hand of Wisdom and Action. Elemental type changes Lightning → Cold. Attribute scaling swaps INT → DEX.
